Off Calendar Jul-19-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lori Cheshire.
Steven A. Booska, Esq. for Plaintiff: Premier Security Solutions Corporation.
Plaintiff's witness: Paul Frankos, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Foreign Trade Zone 3, Inc. aka Foreign Trade Zone 3, as follows:
Damages $33,640.00
Prejudgment Interest $1,991.52
Attorney's Fees $8,000.00
Costs $332.50, for a total of $43,964.02
Judgment signed in open court.
